title: Positioning, Navigation and Timing Growth: call for evidence
body: " The deadline for views was extended until 11.59pm on 22 September 2025.  It was previously planned to close on 25 August 2025.   The Positioning, Navigation and Timing (PNT) Growth call for evidence will kickstart the development of PNT growth strategy and the drive for resilient PNT adoption and innovation for PNT based productivity.  This call for evidence is seeking views on the:   UK PNT market and research and development (R&D) landscape barriers to market entry commercialisation and user adoption   "
